title: Endpoints
body:
# Endpoints

## Pages

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/api/pages` | List all pages |
| GET | `/api/pages/:slug` | Get page by slug |
| POST | `/api/pages` | Create a page |
| PUT | `/api/pages/:id` | Update a page |
| DELETE | `/api/pages/:id` | Delete a page |

## Documents

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/api/docs` | List all docs |
| GET | `/api/docs/:section/:slug` | Get doc by section and slug |
| POST | `/api/docs` | Create a doc |
| PUT | `/api/docs/:id` | Update a doc |
| DELETE | `/api/docs/:id` | Delete a doc |

## Search

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/api/search?q=query` | Full-text search across all content |

## Media

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/api/media` | List uploads |
| POST | `/api/media` | Upload a file |
| DELETE | `/api/media/:id` | Delete a file |
